overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic open-world western game showing a character in cowboy attire traversing a mountainous wilderness at night. The character moves continuously through grassy hillsides, rocky outcrops, and valley terrain under a dark overcast sky with distant mountain silhouettes visible throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassy hillside with distant mountain views

agents.ego_description: walking steadily uphill through tall grass on an open hillside

entered.detail: tall dry grass covering the ground where the character walks
silhouetted mountain peaks visible on the horizon under dark clouds
tall evergreen trees dotting the hillside
large boulder formation on the right side of the hill

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide grassy hillside at night, with the character walking away from the camera through tall grass. Distant mountains are visible on the horizon under an overcast sky, while scattered pine trees and a large rock outcrop define the landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky hillside with dense vegetation and outcrops

events.description: character crouches down briefly while moving through tall vegetation

agents.ego_description: crouching briefly while navigating through dense brush and tall grass near rock formations

entered.detail: large rocky formation emerging on the left side of the path
thick bushes and tall vegetation surrounding the path
valley opening visible between the mountain slopes ahead

segments.scene_description: The character moves through denser vegetation with rock outcrops appearing on the left. The terrain becomes more enclosed as the character briefly crouches while navigating the brush, with a mountain valley becoming visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain valley with wildflowers between steep slopes

events.description: terrain shifts from open grassy hillside to enclosed valley with rocky edges

agents.ego_description: walking through a valley with wildflowers on either side heading toward mountain pass

entered.detail: clusters of white and red wildflowers growing in the grass
rocky cliff wall rising steeply on the left side of the valley
ground becoming rockier with visible stones and gravel

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a more enclosed mountain valley with steep cliff faces on the left and wildflowers dotting the grass. The terrain becomes rockier underfoot as the character moves deeper into the valley toward a distant mountain pass.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky stream bed between mountain slopes

agents.ego_description: navigating carefully through a rocky dry stream bed between steep slopes

entered.detail: dry creek bed with loose rocks and stones underfoot
tall rocky cliff wall close on the left side
scattered large boulders on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character descending through a rocky dry stream bed with steep rock faces on the left and scattered boulders. The vegetation thins out as the terrain becomes predominantly rocky gravel, with the valley opening visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wide nocturnal wilderness that gradually narrows into a rugged mountain valley. It begins on an open grassy hillside with the character walking away from the camera toward distant mountain silhouettes under an overcast sky. As the character moves forward, the terrain becomes more enclosed with denser vegetation and rock outcrops appearing on the left, leading the way toward a visible valley ahead. The scene then shifts into a deeper mountain valley characterized by steep cliff faces and wildflowers dotting the rocky ground. Finally, the camera follows the character as they descend through a dry stream bed of gravel and boulders, where the lush greenery thins out against the towering rock walls.
